DataVision Pro · v2026.4

From raw spreadsheet to clean, AI-explained insight in seconds.

Upload a CSV or Excel file. DataVision Pro automatically cleans, profiles, and analyses it — then explains what matters in plain English with built-in AI chat, predictions, and clustering.

Launch the app — 60 days free → See features

No credit card. Full Tier 3 features during the trial.

Why DataVision Pro

Analysts spend up to 80% of their time cleaning data. We built the other 80% back.

Auto-cleaning pipeline

Trim, dedupe, infer types, impute missing values, and flag outliers as an ordered, reorderable list of toggleable substeps. Save it as a recipe and replay on next month's file.

Statistics & profiling

Descriptive stats, correlations, and distributions on every column — with currency codes and your preferred number/date formats applied automatically.

ML & clustering

K-Means risk clustering, RandomForest predictions, enhanced outlier detection — without leaving the analysis page.

AI that knows your data

Built-in GPT chat that answers questions about your dataset, plus auto-generated reports with recommendations.

How it works

Three clicks, not three sprints.

1. Upload

Drag any CSV or Excel file (up to 200 MB on Tier 3). Encoding and delimiter are detected automatically.

2. Auto-analyse

Cleaning, statistics, charts, ML, and predictions run on demand — toggleable step by step so you stay in control.

3. Ask anything

Chat with the AI assistant in natural language. Export a polished report when leadership needs an answer.

Built on real research

Honest numbers, cited sources.

Up to 80%
of a data scientist's time goes to data preparation, not analysis.
Anaconda — State of Data Science 2022
$12.9M / year
average cost of poor data quality to a single organisation.
Gartner — How to Improve Your Data Quality
91%
of deployed ML models silently degrade over time without monitoring.
Nature Scientific Reports (2022)

Frequently asked questions

Do I need to install anything?

No. DataVision Pro runs in any modern browser on Mac, Windows, Linux, ChromeOS, or tablet.

What file formats are supported?

CSV and Excel (.xlsx). Files up to 200 MB and 1,000,000 rows on Tier 3.

Is there a free trial?

Yes — every new account gets 60 days of full Tier 3 access (AI chat, predictions, ML, and exports). No credit card required.

Where is my data stored?

Your uploaded datasets are stored in our managed PostgreSQL database, accessible only to your account. You can delete a dataset at any time.

Do I need to know SQL or Python?

No. The whole platform is built around clicking, toggling, and asking questions in plain English.

Ready to stop wrangling and start analysing?

60 days of full Tier 3 access. No credit card.

Launch the app →

An intelligent data analytics platform that turns raw datasets into clear, actionable insights — in seconds, no code required.
